MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MARY BURNS MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Granted per non-opposition filed on 9/4/03. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2003 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephen Michael Williams, Esq., 292-3656, for defendant Mary Burns, demurring party
Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. of BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN 409-7611, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- DEFENDANT MARY BURNS' DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Demurrer sustained with 5 days leave to amend to make complaint consistent with 3-day notice or to explain rent calculation. The Court deferred ruling on defendant's request to consolidate 606321 with 418824 until a formal motion is made. (KMC/301/CW) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Off Calendar
